caption: The video captures a formal session in what appears to be a legislative assembly or parliament. The setting is an indoor hall with rows of wooden desks and chairs, where numerous individuals, dressed in traditional and formal attire, are seated attentively. The participants seem engaged in a serious discussion or listening to a speaker, as indicated by their focused expressions and body language. Some individuals are taking notes, while others are observing the proceedings closely. The atmosphere suggests a structured and official environment, likely involving important political or governmental matters. The presence of microphones on the desks further emphasizes the formal nature of the event.
